title: Black Friday
content:
# Black Friday Sale 2026

Welcome to our annual Black Friday event. Here are the mechanics and policies:

* **Promo Code**: BFCM2026
* **Discount**: 20% off all refurbished products.
* **Applicable Categories**: Refurbished phones, tablets, and laptops.
* **Extended Return Policy**: All orders placed during this Black Friday event are eligible for our extended holiday return window. You can return any purchased item until **January 31, 2027** (instead of our standard 30-day window).

title: Summer Referral
content:
# Summer Referral Program 2026

Invite your friends and save:

* **Referrer Reward**: Get $50 store credit for every friend who makes their first purchase.
* **Friend Discount**: Your friend gets $50 off their first order over $200 using your unique link.
* **Promo Code**: SUMMER50
* **Status**: This promotion is currently inactive.
